Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can represent exclusive choice with X option1 option2 Concurrency with + activity1 activity2 Sequence with -> first second Loop with * subtree So overall tree -> A -> -> RG IA maybe Better define a sequence node -> A -> RG IA next

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND

Name: Validation - PE
